title: Fix product data not appearing — reseed backend with correct Ferrari Cheque data

requirements.text: Fix the backend seed data so that the Ferrari Cheque fabric product (with its updated minimum order quantity and colour values) is correctly stored and returned by the `getProducts` endpoint. Ensure the product appears in the products listing on the frontend after a fresh deploy.

quotes: can you check if the products are showing up correctly now, including the Ferrari Cheque fabric with the updated minimum order and colour
I am not able to see the changes

acceptanceCriteria: The `getProducts` query returns at least one product including the Ferrari Cheque fabric.
The Ferrari Cheque product has the correct updated minimum order quantity and colour values in the returned data.
The Products page on the frontend displays the Ferrari Cheque product card without errors.
The Home page featured products grid also shows the product.

constraints: Do not alter the existing product/inquiry/user data model types unless strictly necessary to fix the seed data.
All backend logic must remain within the single main actor in backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Adding new product types or new fields beyond fixing the existing Ferrari Cheque seed entry.
Any frontend UI redesign or layout changes.
Authentication or role-based access control changes.
